distance_km.note: Search results mention 25 km trails at Big Mountain Nordic (Glacier Nordic Club) and Whitefish Lake Golf Course, but no specific 'Glacier Nordic Races' 25 km race confirmed.[2][3][4]

elevation_m.note: Trailforks lists 1,125 ft (~343 m) total vertical for Big Mountain Nordic trails, outside 200m ±100m tolerance, but no specific race elevation gain found for 'Glacier Nordic Races'.[2]

country.note: All Glacier Nordic Club trails and events are in Montana, USA.[2][3][4]

region_state_province.note: Glacier Nordic Club operates in Whitefish, Montana area.[2][4][6]

discipline.note: Glacier Glide race by Glacier Nordic Club offers both classic and skate; trails groomed for both, but no confirmation for specific 'Glacier Nordic Races'.[3][7]

field_size.note: No participant numbers found for any Glacier Nordic Club races, including Glacier Glide or relays.[7][8]

founded.note: No year founded or first edition found for 'Glacier Nordic Races' or Glacier Nordic Club events.

official_website.note: https://www.glaciernordicclub.org/ is the official site for Glacier Nordic Club, matching provided URL (note: .com vs .org minor discrepancy, but content aligns).[4][7][8]

race_date.note: Glacier Glide on January 9 (2022); Tuesday Night Relay Races Jan-Feb, aligns with January to February.[7][8]
